## 13F disclosures show sizeable TSM stakes at multiple institutional advisors

No actionable signal from routine 13F disclosures. Confirms meaningful institutional ownership of TSM but provides no new thesis input.

- Manning & Napier Advisors holds a $248.86 million stake in TSM — figure is explicit in the headline.
- Sequoia Financial Advisors holds a $22.36 million TSM position — figure is explicit in the headline.
- These are passive disclosure filings, not new buy or sell decisions; timing relative to the filing quarter-end is not specified.
- Classifier confidence is low; no fundamental or business signal.
